heading: Allotments and payments of Federal capital contributions
label: 297d Allotments and payments of Federal capital contributions
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a)(2)(A), was repealed by , , .Section 297c of this titlePub. L. 105–392, title I, § 123(3)112 Stat. 3562Nov. 13, 1998

Amendments2010—Subsecs. (a)(3), (c). substituted “this part” for “this subpart”.Pub. L. 111–1481992—Subsec. (a)(3). struck out “(A)” after “(3)”, substituted “available for allotment until expended.” for “available for allotment in such fiscal year and in the fiscal year succeeding the fiscal year.” and “this subpart.” for “this subpart, except that in making such allotments, the Secretary shall give priority to schools of nursing which established student loan funds under this subpart after .”, and struck out subpar. (B) which read as follows: “With respect to funds available pursuant to subparagraph (A), any such funds returned to the Secretary and not allotted by the Secretary, during the period of availability specified in such subparagraph, shall be available to carry out and, for such purpose, shall remain available until expended.”Pub. L. 102–408section 297j of this titleSeptember 30, 19751988—Subsec. (a)(3). designated existing provisions as subpar. (A) and added subpar. (B).Pub. L. 100–6071985—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally, substituting provisions relating to application for allotment, reduction or adjustment of amount requested in application, reallotment, and availability of funds for allotment during fiscal years for provisions relating to determination of amount of allotment.Pub. L. 99–92Subsec. (b). amended subsec. (b) generally, substituting provisions relating to payment to a loan fund of a school of allotments for provisions relating to application for allotment, adjustment or reduction of amount requested in application, and reallotment.Pub. L. 99–921975—Subsec. (a). , (4)(A)(i), (i)(4), substituted “subpart” for “part” wherever appearing, struck out “(whether as Federal capital contributions or as loans to schools under )” before “which are in excess”, and substituted references to section 847 of the Act for references to section 824, which had previously been translated as , requiring no further translations in text as a result of renumbering of the Public Health Service Act.Pub. L. 94–63, § 941(h)(1)section 297f of this titlesection 297c of this titleSubsec. (b)(1). , struck out “, and for loans pursuant to ,” after “contributions”.Pub. L. 94–63, § 941(h)(4)(A)(ii)section 297f of this titleSubsec. (b)(2). , struck out “of Health, Education, and Welfare” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–63, § 941(h)(2)Subsec. (c). , substituted “subpart” for “part”.Pub. L. 94–63, § 941(h)(1)1968—Subsec. (a). substituted a new formula for distribution of Federal funds among schools of nursing by providing for allotment of funds among the schools entirely on the basis of their relative enrollments for former provisions which allocated funds among the States, 50 per centum on the basis of relative number of high school graduates, and 50 per centum on the basis of relative number of students enrolled in schools of nursing, and provided for determination of number of persons enrolled in such schools for most recent year for which satisfactory data are available to the Secretary.Pub. L. 90–4901966—Subsec. (a). , authorized allotment of appropriations for payment as Federal capital contributions or as loans to schools under , and directed that funds available in any fiscal year for payment to schools under this part (whether as Federal capital contributions or as loans to schools under ) which are in excess of the amount appropriated pursuant to for that year shall be allotted among States and among schools within States in such manner as the Secretary determinates will best carry out the purposes of this part.Pub. L. 89–751, § 6(c)(1)section 297f of this titlesection 297f of this titlesection 297c of this titleSubsec. (b)(1). , substituted “schools of nursing in a State must file applications for Federal capital contributions, and for loans pursuant to , from the allotment of such State under the first two sentences of subsection (a) of this section” for “schools of nursing with which he has in effect agreements under this part must file applications for Federal capital contributions to their loan funds pursuant to ”.Pub. L. 89–751, § 6(c)(2)section 297f of this titlesection 297a(b)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Application for allotment; reduction or adjustment of amount requested in application; reallotment; continued availability of funds
children.label: a Application for allotment; reduction or adjustment of amount requested in application; reallotment; continued availability of funds

children.text: The Secretary shall from time to time set dates by which schools of nursing must file applications for Federal capital contributions.

children.label: i
children.text: The amount requested in its application.

children.label: ii
children.text: An amount which bears the same ratio to the total amount appropriated as the number of students estimated by the Secretary to be enrolled on a full-time basis in such school during such fiscal year bears to the estimated total number of students enrolled in all such schools on a full-time basis during such year.

children.label: B
children.text: Amounts remaining after allotment under subparagraph (A) shall be reallotted in accordance with clause (ii) of such subparagraph among schools whose applications requested more than the amounts so allotted to their loan funds, but with such adjustments as may be necessary to prevent the total allotted to any such school’s loan fund under this paragraph and paragraph (3) from exceeding the total so requested by it.

Funds which, pursuant to or pursuant to a loan agreement under are returned to the Secretary in any fiscal year, shall be available for allotment until expended. Funds described in the preceding sentence shall be allotted among schools of nursing in such manner as the Secretary determines will best carry out this part.section 297e(c) of this titlesection 297a of this title

children.heading: Installment payment of allotments
children.label: b Installment payment of allotments
children.text: Allotments to a loan fund of a school shall be paid to it from time to time in such installments as the Secretary determines will not result in unnecessary accumulations in the loan fund at such school.

children.heading: Manner of payment
children.label: c Manner of payment
children.text: The Federal capital contributions to a loan fund of a school under this part shall be paid to it from time to time in such installments as the Secretary determines will not result in unnecessary accumulations in the loan fund at such school.
